speaker: BANQUO
text: How goes the night, boy?

speaker: FLEANCE
text: The moon is down. I have not heard the clock.

speaker: BANQUO
text: And she goes down at twelve.

speaker: FLEANCE
text: I take ’t ’tis later, sir.

speaker: BANQUO
text: Hold, take my sword.

speaker: BANQUO
text: There’s husbandry in heaven;

speaker: BANQUO
text: Their candles are all out. Take thee that too.

speaker: BANQUO
text: A heavy summons lies like lead upon me,

speaker: BANQUO
text: And yet I would not sleep. Merciful powers,

speaker: BANQUO
text: Restrain in me the cursèd thoughts that nature

speaker: BANQUO
text: Gives way to in repose.

speaker: BANQUO
text: Give me my sword.—Who’s there?

speaker: MACBETH
text: A friend.

speaker: BANQUO
text: What, sir, not yet at rest? The King’s abed.

speaker: BANQUO
text: He hath been in unusual pleasure, and

speaker: BANQUO
text: Sent forth great largess to your offices.

speaker: BANQUO
text: This diamond he greets your wife withal,

speaker: BANQUO
text: By the name of most kind hostess, and shut up

speaker: BANQUO
text: In measureless content.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Being unprepared,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Our will became the servant to defect,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Which else should free have wrought.

speaker: BANQUO
text: All’s well.

speaker: BANQUO
text: I dreamt last night of the three Weïrd Sisters.

speaker: BANQUO
text: To you they have showed some truth.

speaker: MACBETH
text: I think not of them.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Yet, when we can entreat an hour to serve,

speaker: MACBETH
text: We would spend it in some words upon that business,

speaker: MACBETH
text: If you would grant the time.

speaker: BANQUO
text: At your kind’st leisure.

speaker: MACBETH
text: If you shall cleave to my consent, when ’tis,

speaker: MACBETH
text: It shall make honor for you.

speaker: BANQUO
text: So I lose none

speaker: BANQUO
text: In seeking to augment it, but still keep

speaker: BANQUO
text: My bosom franchised and allegiance clear,

speaker: BANQUO
text: I shall be counseled.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Good repose the while.

speaker: BANQUO
text: Thanks, sir. The like to you.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Go bid thy mistress, when my drink is ready,

speaker: MACBETH
text: She strike upon the bell. Get thee to bed.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Is this a dagger which I see before me,

speaker: MACBETH
text: The handle toward my hand? Come, let me clutch thee.

speaker: MACBETH
text: I have thee not, and yet I see thee still.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Art thou not, fatal vision, sensible

speaker: MACBETH
text: To feeling as to sight? Or art thou but

speaker: MACBETH
text: A dagger of the mind, a false creation

speaker: MACBETH
text: Proceeding from the heat-oppressèd brain?

speaker: MACBETH
text: I see thee yet, in form as palpable

speaker: MACBETH
text: As this which now I draw.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Thou marshal’st me the way that I was going,

speaker: MACBETH
text: And such an instrument I was to use.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Mine eyes are made the fools o’ th’ other senses

speaker: MACBETH
text: Or else worth all the rest. I see thee still,

speaker: MACBETH
text: And, on thy blade and dudgeon, gouts of blood,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Which was not so before. There’s no such thing.

speaker: MACBETH
text: It is the bloody business which informs

speaker: MACBETH
text: Thus to mine eyes. Now o’er the one-half world

speaker: MACBETH
text: Nature seems dead, and wicked dreams abuse

speaker: MACBETH
text: The curtained sleep. Witchcraft celebrates

speaker: MACBETH
text: Pale Hecate’s off’rings, and withered murder,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Alarumed by his sentinel, the wolf,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Whose howl’s his watch, thus with his stealthy pace,

speaker: MACBETH
text: With Tarquin’s ravishing strides, towards his design

speaker: MACBETH
text: Moves like a ghost. Thou sure and firm-set earth,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Hear not my steps, which way they walk, for fear

speaker: MACBETH
text: Thy very stones prate of my whereabouts

speaker: MACBETH
text: And take the present horror from the time,

speaker: MACBETH
text: Which now suits with it. Whiles I threat, he lives.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Words to the heat of deeds too cold breath gives.

speaker: MACBETH
text: I go, and it is done. The bell invites me.

speaker: MACBETH
text: Hear it not, Duncan, for it is a knell

speaker: MACBETH
text: That summons thee to heaven or to hell.
